name: PER_EMPL_DELETE_TXN_DATA
description: This table stores data of a deleted business object.

columns.Name: EMPL_DELETE_TXN_DATA_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key. Uniquely identifies a record.

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies an action occurrence record. Foreign Key to PER_ACTION_OCCURRENCES table.

columns.Name: ACTION_DATE
columns.Comments: Effective date of the record being deleted.

columns.Name: ENTITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Entity Type stores the object of a transactional entity.

columns.Name: ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Stores surrogate key of the Entity Type.

columns.Name: PARENT_ENTITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Parent Entity Type stores the parent object of a transactional entity.

columns.Name: PARENT_ENTITY_KEY_ID
columns.Comments: Stores surrogate key of the Parent Entity Type.

columns.Name: EMPL_DELETE_TXN_DATA_XML
columns.Comments: Stores the deleted object business data.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.
